title: Club Constitution & By-Laws
description: Official Bendigo Phoenix constitution and by-laws document. Required reading for all committee members.

title: Registration & Fees Policy
description: Current season registration process, fee schedules, and payment plan options for all age groups.

title: Annual Budget Template
description: Spreadsheet template for planning seasonal budgets including uniforms, venue hire, equipment, and travel.

title: Working With Children Check Guide
description: Step-by-step guide for volunteers and coaches to obtain and submit their WWCC as required by Basketball Victoria.

title: Parent Communication Template
description: Email and newsletter templates for communicating season information, game schedules, and club updates to families.

title: End-of-Season Presentation Guide
description: Planning checklist and run sheet template for organising end-of-season award nights and presentations.

title: Incident Report Form
description: Standard form for recording on-court incidents, injuries, or conduct issues during games and training sessions.

title: Sponsorship Proposal Template
description: Customisable sponsorship proposal document to approach local businesses for club funding and in-kind support.
